zh.lifeSummary: 當William Hayward於1405年出生在英國格盧斯特斯爾坎布利其時，他的父親John Heyward25歲，母親Margarey Weaver23歲。他於1427年與Lucia De Cam Harding結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1450年在英國史洛普爾布洛可頓享年45歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Hayward于1405年出生在英国格盧斯特斯爾坎布利其时，他的父亲John Heyward25岁，母亲Margarey Weaver23岁。他于1427年与Lucia De Cam Harding结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他去世于1450年在英国史洛普爾布洛可頓享年45岁。

nameMeanings.name: Hayward
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: occupational name from Middle English hayward ‘keeper of the hedges and enclosures’ (Old English hēgweard), a manorial officer in charge of the common fields who protected corn and hay from cattle, theft, or damage, and supervised the harvest.

variants.name: Hayworth
meanings: English (Lancashire and Yorkshire): variant of   Hayward  ,   Haywood  , or   Haworth  .

variants.name: Howard
meanings: English: of Norman origin, from the Middle English personal names Huward (also Howard) and Heward, from Old French Huard (itself from ancient Germanic Hugihard, hugi- ‘mind, understanding, spirit’ + hard- ‘hardy, bold’). As Hugh appears in Middle English as both How and Hew, this is the definite origin of Heward and a source of Howard. This surname is also very common among African Americans. See Hugh .

English: from the Middle English personal name Haward or Howard, usually an Anglicized form of Old Danish Hāwarth (Old Norse Hávarthr, from há ‘high’ + varthr ‘guard, guardian, warden’). Alternation between Haward and Howard may have led to later confusion with Hayward .
English: occasionally a variant of   Ewart   2.

variants.name: Heyworth
meanings: English (Lancashire and Yorkshire): variant of   Hayward  ,   Haywood  , or   Haworth  .

variants.name: Haywood
meanings: English: habitational name from any of several places called Haywood (Nottinghamshire, Staffordshire, Shropshire, Herefordshire) or Heywood (Lancashire, Wiltshire), or any of many other minor places so named, from Old English (ge)hæg ‘fence, enclosure’ + wudu ‘wood’. It was a common practice in the Middle Ages for areas of woodland to be fenced off as hunting grounds for the nobility. This name may have been confused in some cases with Hayward .
Altered form of English   Hogwood   and of its altered forms   Hagood   and   Haygood  .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William Hayward was born in 1405, in Cambridge, Gloucestershire, England, his father, John Heyward, was 25 and his mother, Margarey Weaver, was 23. He married Lucia De Cam Harding in 1427. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died in 1450, in Brockton, Shropshire, England, at the age of 45.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Hayward est né en 1405, à Cambridge, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, son père, John Heyward, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Margarey Weaver, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Lucia De Cam Harding en 1427. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1450, à Brockton, Shropshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 45 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Hayward 1405 in Cambridge, Gloucestershire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Heyward 25 und seine Mutter Margarey Weaver 23. Er hat 1427 Lucia De Cam Harding geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb 1450 im Alter von 45 Jahren in Brockton, Shropshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Hayward è nato il nel 1405 nel Cambridge, Gloucestershire, England, il suo padre, John Heyward, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Margarey Weaver, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Lucia De Cam Harding nel 1427. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì nel 1450, nel Brockton, Shropshire, England, all'età di 45 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: William Hayward(이)가 1405년 영국 그루스스터실르 캄브리지에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Heyward(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Margarey Weaver(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1427년 Lucia De Cam Harding(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1450년 영국 슈럽실르 브록턴에서 45세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Hayward nasceu em 1405, em Cambridge, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Heyward, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Margarey Weaver, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Lucia De Cam Harding em 1427. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1450, em Brockton, Shropshire, Inglaterra, com 45 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Hayward родился в 1405 г. в местности камбридж, глоусестиршир, Англия, его отцу по имени John Heyward было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Margarey Weaver, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Lucia De Cam Harding в 1427 г. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер в 1450 г. в местности брокктон, шропшир, Англия в возрасте 45 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Hayward nació en 1405, en Cambridge, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, John Heyward, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Margarey Weaver, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Lucia De Cam Harding en 1427. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió en 1450, en Brockton, Shropshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 45 años.
